'''Death''', formerly known as '''Dying Slowly''', was a town on the planet [[Jubilar/Legends|Jubilar]]. It contained a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and was a noted center for [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]].

==Description==
Due to the numerous ongoing wars between factions in the planet-wide penal colony, the appearance of the town changed frequently; areas would go from being well-maintained to run-down within the span of a few years, and the names of prominent locations were frequently changed by whatever faction happened to control the town at the moment. Notable places included the [[Victory Forum]], home of [[Regional Sector Number Four's All-Human Free-For-All]] in [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]], and the warehouse district known as [[Executioner's Row]].
